# normalize-cfg/tests/fixtures

Test fixture source files for CFG builder snapshot tests.

- `rust/` — Rust fixtures: `linear.rs`, `branch.rs`, `loop_.rs`, `nested.rs`, `early_return.rs`, `match_.rs`
- `python/` — Python fixtures: `linear.py`, `branch.py`, `loop_.py`, `early_return.py`
- `go/` — Go fixtures: `linear.go`, `branch.go`, `loop_.go`, `early_return.go` (tests skip gracefully if grammar not installed)
